data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions that Sarah accepts the class assignment, there is no concrete evidence of an API endpoint or system behavior that explicitly allows substitutes to accept or decline assignments. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline assignments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
